footer.clubName: Club des Cinéastes Amateurs de Hammamlif
footer.mission: Our mission and goals are far beyond celebrating cinema as an art. We have a philosophical foundation. We use it as a medium to question, reflect, and share ideas.

footer.critique: Beyond art, cinema as a voice for ideas and critique.
